_comment: Brand configuration template for asyre-social. Copy this file to brands/<brand-id>/brand.json and fill in values.
_id_comment: Unique identifier, lowercase, no spaces. Used as folder name and CLI flag.
name: 品牌显示名
_name_comment: Display name shown in watermarks, headers, and UI.

colors._background_comment: Page background color. Dark (#0D0D0F) or light (#FAFAF8).
colors._primary_comment: Main accent color for titles, highlights, interactive elements.
colors._secondary_comment: Secondary accent for subheadings, tags, supporting elements.
colors._text_comment: Main body text color. High contrast against background.
colors._text_dim_comment: Muted text for dates, captions, page numbers.
colors._accent_comment: Tertiary color for callouts, warnings, special emphasis.

fonts.heading: Noto Serif SC
fonts._heading_comment: Font for h1/h2/h3 and titles. Serif recommended for Chinese.
fonts._body_comment: Font for body text and paragraphs.
fonts._mono_comment: Monospace font for code, page numbers, labels.

visual._tone_variants_comment: Array of tone names (e.g. 'tech', 'literary'). Each gets a .tone-<name> CSS class that overrides color variables.

ai_style._preferred_styles_comment: Style keywords for AI image generation prompts.
ai_style._color_constraints_comment: Natural language description of color rules for AI image gen.
ai_style._negative_comment: Words to explicitly exclude from AI image prompts.

text_render._page_size_comment: [width, height] in pixels. Standard XHS/social card is 1080x1440.
text_render._dropcap_comment: Enable decorative first-letter dropcap on first paragraph.
text_render._golden_sentence_comment: Enable .highlight class for pull-quote styling with colored left border.
text_render._background_texture_comment: Path to background texture image (relative to brands dir), or null for solid color.

signature.author: Author Name
signature._avatar_comment: Path to avatar image, or null if no avatar.
